title: Some  Managerial  level Questions for Job Interviews
author: Priya
content:
Top picks for Job


 • How will you help your coworker who is experiencing difficulties in his/her work ?

~ I will check with them where they r failing and what difficulties they r entangled with. I would try to identify the root cause of their impending issue and would go deep within to resolve their complexities to give a clear resolution to their queries. And if they had some differing views to any topics than mine I will give a clear guide for their understanding by giving them a quick fix to lighten up their burden for an easy way out to help them deal with their difficulties.

I remember while I was working in my last project some of my group mates were finding some issues in code writing for a case study .I helped them in writing a clean code in a procedural style , prepared a clear wire frame for our app to make our designing clear and understandable for our team lead . Helped them in every functional testing of code , bug fixing, in spotting errors. And by helping them it also helped me in expanding my knowledge base while dealing with their queries , working with them hand in hand like in a joint venture which was a moral support for them in their eyes but a lesson for me to handle tough problems and make myself more future ready for handling some difficult task .

* Can u work in a tough , challenging environment .

~ Sometimes it happens that we r bound to work in an environment that isn't much conducive for us to work on but any negligence in work due to an unfriendly environment we r working in can impede our work output in the work and can also impact company's overall productivity . And being an employee of the company who supported us in our rise and fall we should also give our equitable support by working as a leaning in employee to work in every tough circumstances and challenging situations with which we try to ran off .

* How can u show perfection in your work ?

~ I will do my work with effectiveness to achieve desired output. If work is extra laborious for me I will take some time in going with all the major segments 1st to handle them with perfection and than the things which r more general.And to work with perfection requires lots many derivatives to deal with. Like working closely on key highlights, dealing with complex issues , stick to timelines to deliver work on time and how well and successfully we marked our work into completion. I will keep in mind all these key aspects and will give my maximum hours to work to drive me through results.

 

 • How will you adapt yourself in a challenging work environment . 

~ If I am working in an environment which is a bit challenging for me to work than I will try not to shy away with my responsibility and will deal with it proactively.Tackling  over- concerning issues , failing in it won't weaken my morale instead would make me more combative to work with it.And I am sure when I will work on such challenging, tough environment It will make me accustomed to work and handle big, critical issues to make myself adaptable in working in a challenging environment. And if I work in an environment where I have to devote my extra time and energy than that extra hours of my work will build a good experience history of mine and would make me more competent in handling tough projects in real time.


 • What’s the most difficult thing that you have ever done. ?

~ Studying, scoring well in exam and working on to get a good job with my excellence and hard work has been a toughest phase of my life.Well every person go through it in their life but not everyone work with that determination and hard work that I have put through during my course of studies for clearing job interviews.I excelled in my university exams , fought many job interviews not able to clear them were my weakness and was a difficult period of my time but I worked to deal with my insecurities , weaklings by working even more harder with my studies. And for today also I can't say whether I will be selected or not but failing today won't break me instead will help me prepare for my next upcoming drive by self examining myself where I am failing.

 • How do you respond to change. 

~ When I see something isn't happening as it is supposed to be I would take a neutral ground by not reacting to it instantly .And would make sharp observation to fix it or bring a change inorder to make it right.Many times I have been through many tough circumstances in life and faced a very reprehensible outcome for not taking any timely action on it.

I remember a time of my school days when I enacted a skit with my team to perform a scene on stage but it didn't played out as I planned for it .And that was a bit sparring for me and others but when it was my turn I made it right by my natural instinct and off beat performance to prevent any spillover effect of it going terribly wrong or backfiring me with an inverse reaction from the others side of people watching my play .

 • what do you believe makes a successful team. 

~ A team must possess all those qualities that make them a good team.Members should have a built-in trust and full reliance on one another to support each other and form a basis of their team building. If u don't have a good bonding with your other teammates , a trust factor would never develop and u can never show your usefulness and worth without associating yourself with them and support them as a reliable team player. And to be a part of a team it is of most significance to be a good person 1st .If u r self-centric and always thinks of your good than considering of your team 1st , u will find yourself in a corner as a valueless , defunct item lacking purpose. So,I believe for a successful team it is very important that u value your team firsthand and treat them as a part of u not like an outcast , pointless material which is casted aside like a fly in milk.

• Which is more effective for an Individual working with a team or working alone by itself.?

~ Whether u work in a team or do it alone by yourself the quality of your work and a fulfilling outcome at the end of it is seen and everyone sees your end result not the process how u achieve it. But I think it depends on the type of work we r doing if our work is lengthy and requires many hands to work on than team work would give an effective outcome and if work is simple and can be completed single-handedly than it can be done alone.But ofcourse working in a team gives more added benefits . A team helps in dividing your work and lessen up per head overcast duties for every individual. A good team excites u , motivate u to work with a positive mindset. And working in a team can simplify our work, introduce new ideas, thoughts and inclusivity of different talent minds which will have a direct effect of it in our work to be more productive , result-oriented and more effective.

And if we r working in a team having a cultural diversity of people of different ethnicity , religious groups we can have a mixed culture of people and under such diverse workforce we can bring a huge positive change in our work and also we would learn and practice different cultural values, religious beliefs and will follow their custom and convention to value them and their culture.

 • Do you consider yourself a good team player.                                

~ To be a good team player it is very important that there should be a mutual understanding among each members and whatever decisions they take it should be unanimously approved by everyone to avoid any conflict or chaos at the end of it.A good team work and a positive mindset of working can help u in managing a team better.If u don't have a team work spirit than u will find yourself engulfed with heavy workload and u may take hours in doing the work that could be done in a lesser time with a collaborative team effort. A good team player needs a good team work ,an effective work plan for problem solving , love and respect for your team mates and their equal contribution in every decision making.

Whenever I worked in a team I tried to maintain quality in my work by closely working with them , helping them in their queries , by giving my equal participation in work ,by treating them with due respect and by giving them all possible assistance and maximum share of my time in resolving their underlying issues . Thereby , increasing productivity of our work and maintaining a work life balance in their personal and professional life.

•  How good r u in handling your work ?

~ I am very supportive by nature and assist my team mates, peers whenever they r stuck in their work . I treat everyone equally whether a person is highly professional or just an entry level employee. To manage my work and responsibilities , I remain very particular about how to handle my work with care and how to delegate responsibilities to others to complete any assigned task in a timely manner. If there is any work that's needed to be done with immediate effect I do all the analysis and synthesis to mark it complete in a given timeline. By doing my work in a timely order and by making close cooperation with my team mates , I manage to do my work effectively to build my own image infront of every other member of my group and to make my company's  listing in a big fortune company.

• This is your dream company. If you are given a role that is not matching your expectations , will you still work for the company. 

~ Every work has equal weightage in the job market and in whatever field u work growth is certain if u r giving your 100% in making it a success for u. It may happen that u gain more excellence in the field u r less skilled by working on it like an hard core worker. And what work u do matters a lot than concerning how much knowledge u possess or how skilled u r .If that has to happen than our mentors , teachers who made us that capable and skilled for a job could get that better position for themselves.But our knowledge and skills remains inside of us becoz those piece of knowledge can only be seen in a paper but not in real life when u actually have to perform in your work with the knowledge set u acquired to work on it.

So, if I get to work for my dream company I would work for it without giving any due cognisance on what role I will be put into , and whether it is matching my key skills or qualification or even thinking of how much I will be paid for it.


 • If your boss rejected all Your proposal for a client project how will you make up your boss mind to share your views with the client.

~ If my boss is not agreeing to my proposal than I will 1st make them understand all key things about my project and would admit them into buying in to my proposal . All effort I put in while working in the project , what clear objective it draws to benefit the company and how it serves the real purpose of growth and economic development for the company .And if it is that my proposal is not winning to satisfy their demands I will dig more deeper in to make necessary changes in my work meeting their expectations.

 • If you see some unfair practices happening in your office what actions will you take to maintain your company’s reputation and also serve your loyalty to your employer.

~ If I see there r some wrong, inappropriate activities happening in my office I will report it to the HR or the concerned team who is the enforcer and investigator of workplace harassment or any illegal activities going in the office. But if my action could harm company's reputation than I will remain honest to my company and its people and would try not to aggravate the situation further by involving any external investigating team to settle out the matter instead would stand loyal to my employer to deal with it internally within the office. And if any such mis-happenings embezzling company's property and becoming a cause of slow or retarding growth for the company than I will invite some stringent actions against all those employees who r an accomplice in such crimes.

 • Tell me about a time where you displayed good leadership skills. 

~ I have worked as a lead member of my team while I was working in my past project .I handled the project with exuberance , supporting my team in their slow down , instructing them with usable inputs , showcasing my concern and care for them . I guide them with all possible assistance they requested for and help them at every level of their bewilderment exhibiting my leadership qualities. My personalized and caring behaviour towards my employees , soft attitude , and timely delivery of work qualified me to work as a lead member of my team to handle my work mindfully for a desired outcome. (Experienced)

                                    Or

I remember a time when I was working in my school's final project where not as lead but I worked as a most consequential part of my team handling all major roles and responsibilities of the project .Our examinar was on the run and we were to give an actual demo of our project .All my team mates were nervous including me.But than I take the lead and explained all core things about the project ,it's working in much detail .I boost my teammates' confidence by overcoming their fear of speaking and give them a chance line by line to explain about the project.And at the end of all this our examinar and proctor was impressed by our project and especially complimented me for taking up the project as a lead .(Fresher)

• How will u be a good appraiser for your employees ?

~ I think instead of giving compliments to my employees on their achievements I can be a good appraiser for them by guiding them on their bad performance at work .If they r doing something wrong or committing any mistakes in their work I should mentor them and give clear advice on how to approach doing something correctly. If I show disapproval or give bad reviews on their work it could demotivate them and can also impact their annual appraisal. But if I correct them on their wrong inputs than it will set a clear notion for them to not to repeat the same mistakes again if ever encountered in the future and deal with similar situation wisely without waiting for anyone else to object u or point finger at u on your wrong doings.

Important HR and Managerial Interview Tips

  • Maintain confidence and speak clearly during HR and managerial rounds.
  • Use practical examples while answering scenario based and behavioral questions.
  • Prepare answers for strengths, weaknesses, leadership and teamwork questions beforehand.
  • Avoid giving overly negative answers about previous companies or managers.
  • Use professional communication and maintain positive body language during interviews.
  • For managerial interviews, focus on leadership, conflict resolution and decision making abilities.
  • While answering behavioral questions, use the STAR method — Situation, Task, Action and Result.
  • Research the company and job role before appearing for HR interviews.
  • Practice self introduction and project explanation multiple times before the interview.
  • Be honest in your answers instead of using memorized responses.
